stat.value: string — the display value e.g. '68%' | '3 hours' | '22 times'
stat.raw_value: number — for frontend logic if needed
stat.stat_type: enum: percentage | count | duration | ratio | streak

copy.label: string — what the stat measures e.g. 'of your listening happened after 11pm'
copy.subtext: string — emotional punch or context e.g. 'The algorithm knows.'
copy.comparison: string | null — optional bench e.g. 'vs. 31% last week'
copy.tone: enum: funny | unsettling | warm | neutral | roast

signal_source.signal_field: string — which field generated this e.g. 'behavioral.late_night_ratio'
signal_source.play_count_basis: integer — how many plays this is computed from

visual.size: enum: large | medium — large for primary card, medium for secondary
visual.icon: string | null — optional contextual icon name
